minimized_surface_detail.verdict: FAIL — main has 745 tracked files, 15x over the <50 target. Tree-shake has not been executed; main still carries the full codebase.

gitsafe_enforced_detail.bug: gitsafe-loader.ts:58-62 — glob-to-regex conversion replaces ** with .* then * with [^/]*, clobbering .* into .[^/]*. Result: node_modules/foo matches but node_modules/foo/bar.js does NOT.
gitsafe_enforced_detail.verdict: PARTIAL — .env and dist/** enforced, but node_modules/** denylist is bypassed for nested paths due to regex bug.

main_locked_detail.expected_hook_version: new (hardening, scripts/hooks/pre-commit with Gate 0: main read-only)
main_locked_detail.verdict: FAIL — .git/hooks/pre-commit is the old test-enforcement hook, not the hardening hook. Gate 0 (block all commits on main) is NOT active. head.json branch discipline IS present but uses the old logic.

archive_complete_detail.main_tip: d87f454 (roadmap: hardening-001 complete — all 13 nodes executed)
archive_complete_detail.verdict: PASS — archive/full-codebase has 1144 files (superset of main's 745). No commits added to archive after fork. Branch is frozen at 65cf0fe.

hardening_tag.commit: ad546b9 (roadmap: L2-L3 batch completion — tree-shake, gitsafe integration, branch architecture)

issues.description: Main has 745 files, not <50. Tree-shake was not applied to main branch. The hardening DAG claims tree-shake complete but the filesystem contradicts.
node_modules/** denylist bypass: gitsafe-loader.ts regex conversion bug at line 58-62. ** → .* then * → [^/]* clobbers the .* replacement. Nested paths like node_modules/foo/bar.js pass through.
issues.fix: Replace sequential .replace() with a single-pass approach using a sentinel: e.g., replace ** with <<<GLOBSTAR>>> first, then * with [^/]*, then <<<GLOBSTAR>>> with .*

issues.description: Wrong pre-commit hook installed in .git/hooks/pre-commit. The installed hook is the old test-enforcement version (hooks/pre-commit), not the hardening version (scripts/hooks/pre-commit). Gate 0 (main read-only) is absent.

summary.overall: FAIL — 3 of 4 hardening constraints are NOT enforced. Only archive completeness passes. Main is not minimized (745 files), gitsafe has a regex bypass bug, and the wrong pre-commit hook is installed.
